COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for the Court to place terms of the settlement on the record. Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff who was also present; Defendant, in pro per, also present. Terms of the settlement were recited by Ms. Keith ( see scanned stipulation for entry of judgment or in the alternative dismissal with prejudice for terms ).
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vauhn # 6185.
